entity.summary: Japan-based regulated centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose service began in August 2014 and continues through its active official trading platform.
entity.notes: Official corporate history places the service launch in August 2014. Current official and independent profiles confirm continuing operation in Japan.

expected.summary: Japan-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Coincheck brand.

changes.summary: Japan-based regulated centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose service began in August 2014 and continues through its active official trading platform.
changes.notes: Official corporate history places the service launch in August 2014. Current official and independent profiles confirm continuing operation in Japan.

events.title: Coincheck service began
events.description: Coincheck began providing its cryptocurrency exchange service in August 2014.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker based on Coincheck's official corporate history.

evidence.title: Coincheck corporate history announcement
evidence.notes: Official corporate source stating that the service began in August 2014.

evidence.title: About Coincheck
evidence.notes: Official service article corroborating Coincheck's exchange identity and history.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Coincheck
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Coincheck identity, Japan registration, and 2014 establishment year.
